name: BoldSign E-Signature API
description: BoldSign is an e-signature platform that enables sending, signing, and managing documents for legally binding electronic signatures. Use this API to create signature requests, manage templates, track document status, embed signing experiences, and handle contacts and branding at $0.75 per document.

capabilities.name: documents_send
capabilities.description: Send a document for e-signature to one or more signers with form fields, reminders, and expiry settings.

capabilities.name: documents_send_from_template
capabilities.description: Send a document for e-signature using a pre-configured template with role-based signer assignment.

capabilities.name: documents_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details and status of a specific document by its document ID.

capabilities.name: documents_list
capabilities.description: List all documents in your account with optional filtering by status, date range, and search text.

capabilities.name: documents_download
capabilities.description: Download the completed signed document as a PDF file.

capabilities.name: documents_audit_trail_download
capabilities.description: Download the audit trail certificate for a completed document showing all signing activity.

capabilities.name: documents_revoke
capabilities.description: Revoke a pending document to prevent any further signing activity.

capabilities.name: documents_remind
capabilities.description: Send a reminder to pending signers for a specific document.

capabilities.name: documents_void
capabilities.description: Void a completed document, invalidating the signatures and rendering it non-binding.

capabilities.name: templates_list
capabilities.description: List all document templates in your account with optional filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: templates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific template including its roles, fields, and configuration.

capabilities.name: templates_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a document template by its template ID.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: List all contacts in your BoldSign account with optional search and pagination.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact with name, email, phone, and organization details.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific contact by their contact ID.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing contact's details by their contact ID.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact from your account by their contact ID.

capabilities.name: embedded_signing_link_get
capabilities.description: Generate an embedded signing link to embed the signing experience directly in your application.

capabilities.name: embedded_sending_link_get
capabilities.description: Generate an embedded sending link to embed the document sending UI in your application.

capabilities.name: sender_identities_list
capabilities.description: List all sender identities configured for your account.

capabilities.name: sender_identities_create
capabilities.description: Create a new sender identity with a name and email for sending signature requests.
